title: 9 Herbal Essential Oils For Oily Hair
description: Thymus vulgaris essential oils contains thymol and carvacrol, two active constituents that help control oily hair. Thymol reduces the growth of bacteria and fungi that contribute to oil buildup on the scalp. Carvacrol has antiseptic and antifungal properties that help balance the scalp's natural pH, reducing oil production.
